rulings.Case Title: SA-RO LEASING INC. VS. JAMES RANKIN SR. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver, Assignment Of Rents And To Execute On Deed Of Trust Via Private Sale Approvable
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, MAY 10, 2007, LINE 4. PLAINTIFF SA-RO LEASING INC.'S Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver, Assignment Of Rents And To Execute On Deed Of Trust Via Private Sale Approvable IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S OVERLONG BRIEF IS NOT CONSIDERED. C.R.C. 3.1113(D) AND (G) AND C.R.C. 3.1300(D). EVEN IF CONSIDERED, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVIDED A SUFFICIENT BASIS TO APPOINT A RECEIVER OR FOR OTHER RELIEF. =(302/PJB/AP)
